summary_en: Bylaw amendment to Article 7 enabling board to authorize share buybacks via market transactions. Authorization effective upon shareholder approval at June 29, 2026 annual meeting. Specific buyback parameters (size, price ceiling, period) not yet disclosed.
title_en: Notice of Bylaw Amendment Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Mino Ceramic filed notice of a bylaw amendment on May 15, 2026. The company's board resolved to submit to the 164th Annual Shareholder Meeting (scheduled June 29, 2026) a proposal to amend Article 7 of its articles of incorporation to enable treasury share acquisitions. The new Article 7 will authorize the board, under Companies Act Section 165(2), to acquire the company's own shares via market transactions. The amendment is conditional on shareholder approval at the June 29 meeting, which is also the effective date. The disclosure states the rationale as enabling flexible capital allocation policy, but does not disclose specific buyback parameters (size, price ceiling, or execution timeline), which will presumably be announced separately following shareholder approval.
